positive: A complex, symmetrical celestial mandala design featuring stylized bioluminescent flora, swirling nebula elements, and abstract cosmic geometry. The color palette is dominated by deep midnight blues, vibrant teal, cosmic lavender, and accents of shimmering metallic gold line work. The composition must be highly detailed, central, and perfectly suited for a screen-printed apparel design. Emphasize strong silhouettes, clean lines, and graphic contrast, achieving a luxurious, illuminated stained-glass etching aesthetic.
